description: UX Polish and Zen Mode - Fix upcoming reviews chart, add item detail navigation, encouragement messages, zen mode, and minimalistic home buttons

userStories.title: Fix Upcoming Reviews Chart Cumulative Count
userStories.description: As a user, I want the cumulative count in the upcoming reviews chart to include reviews I already have pending, so that the total accurately reflects my workload.
acceptanceCriteria: The number in parentheses (e.g., '(50)') includes reviews already available (not just future ones)
The cumulative total = current pending reviews + sum of reviews becoming available through that hour
The chart receives currentPendingCount as a prop from HomeScreen
When there are 10 pending reviews and 5 coming in hour 1, the first row shows '+5 (15)'
Unit tests verify the cumulative calculation includes pending reviews
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add Settings Storage Infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a way to store user preferences locally so that features like zen mode can persist across app sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create user_settings table with key-value storage (setting_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, setting_value TEXT)
Add database functions: getSetting(key), setSetting(key, value), getAllSettings(), deleteSetting(key)
Settings are NOT cleared when user clears API key data (separate from synced data)
Settings support boolean, string, and number values (stored as JSON strings)
Add migration to create the settings table
Unit tests for all CRUD operations
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add Zen Mode Setting Toggle
userStories.description: As a user, I want to enable 'zen mode' in settings so that I can have a distraction-free review experience.
acceptanceCriteria: New toggle in Settings screen: 'Zen Mode' with description 'Hide progress bar and stats during reviews'
Setting persists to database using the new settings infrastructure
Toggle shows current on/off state
Default value is OFF (zen mode disabled)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Apply Zen Mode to Review Session
userStories.description: As a user with zen mode enabled, I want the review session to hide the progress bar, item count, and SRS level badge so I can focus purely on answering.
acceptanceCriteria: When zen mode is ON: hide progress bar, hide 'X / Y' count text, hide SRS level badge
When zen mode is ON: the 'Wrap Up' button remains visible
When wrap-up mode is activated: show progress bar and count (even in zen mode)
When zen mode is OFF: normal behavior (all UI visible)
ReviewSession fetches zen mode setting on mount
Unit tests verify conditional rendering based on zen mode state
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create Item Detail Screen
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a standalone screen to display full item details (radical, kanji, or vocabulary) so users can navigate to it from various places in the app.
acceptanceCriteria: New screen ItemDetailScreen added to navigation stack
Screen accepts subjectId: number as route param
Fetches subject data from database using getSubjectById()
For kanji: fetches component radicals via component_subject_ids
For vocabulary: fetches component kanji via component_subject_ids
Displays all item information: header with character and subject type, meanings, readings (for kanji/vocabulary), meaning mnemonic, reading mnemonic (for kanji/vocabulary)
Has a back button to return to previous screen
Shows loading state while fetching data
Shows error state if subject not found
Header background color matches subject type (radical blue, kanji pink, vocabulary purple)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Components Section to Item Detail Screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the component radicals/kanji that make up an item on its detail screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Item detail screen shows 'Made up of' section for kanji and vocabulary items
For kanji: displays component radicals with their images/characters and meanings
For vocabulary: displays component kanji with their characters and meanings
Components displayed using existing ComponentDisplay component pattern
Section only appears when item has components
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Navigate to Item Detail from Components
userStories.description: As a user, when I tap on a radical or kanji in the 'made up of' section, I want to see the full details of that item.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping a component radical/kanji navigates to ItemDetailScreen
Works in LessonCard's 'Made up of' section
Works in ReviewSession's incorrect answer feedback (inside ExpandableDetails/ItemDetails)
Works in ItemDetailScreen (for recursive navigation)
Navigation is a stack push (back button returns to previous screen)
Visual feedback on tap (opacity change or similar)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Encouragement Message to Review Completion
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see an encouraging message when I finish my reviews so that I feel motivated to continue studying.
acceptanceCriteria: Encouraging message displayed below 'Reviews Complete!' title
Message randomly selected from a pool of 5-10 phrases
Different message each session (pseudo-random selection)
Message styled subtly (secondary text color, smaller font)
Appears after the items reviewed count, before incorrect count
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Redesign Home Screen Buttons
userStories.description: As a user, I want the lessons and reviews buttons on the home screen to be more minimalistic and visually subtle, with the text inside the button.
acceptanceCriteria: Buttons have outlined style (border instead of solid fill)
Button background is white (or app background color)
Border color matches the subject type (pink for lessons, purple for reviews)
Count number displayed large inside the button
Label text ('Lessons' / 'Reviews') displayed below the count, INSIDE the button
When count is 0: more subtle appearance (lighter border, muted text)
Border width ~2px for visibility
Maintains touch target size (min 44px)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill
